title: Fort St. Anthony of Simbor
tagline: Fort St. Anthony of Simbor — heritage city of Daman & Diu

heroImage.alt: Fort St. Anthony of Simbor, Daman & Diu

overview.short: Fort St. Anthony of Simbor is a much-loved heritage city in Daman & Diu, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: Fort St. Anthony of Simbor (Portuguese: Forte de Santo António de Simbor, Forte Simbor, Fortim-do-Mar (Fort of the Sea), Forte Pani Cola is a small ruined fort located on an islet at the mouth of Sahil River (called Vançoso by the Portuguese) in the bay of Simbor, about 25 km east of Diu in India. The fort was built in 1722 to suppress the predatory activities of pirates along the coast. The island fort, along with two small plots of land on either side of the Vançoso River, was part of Simbor, a tiny Portuguese exclave of about 1 square km which was subordinate to the government of Diu.

topPlaces.name: Simbor
topPlaces.description: Simbor is a territory of 0.91 square kilometers located in the estuary of the Sahil River (called Rio Vançoso by the Portuguese) in the cove of Simbor, about 25 km east of Diu. Since its establishment in the early 18th century, this exclave was subordinate to the District of Diu, Portuguese India, until it was occupied by India in December 1961, along with the rest of Portuguese India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Fort St. Anthony of Simbor?
faq.a: The best time to visit Fort St. Anthony of Simbor is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Fort St. Anthony of Simbor?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Diu Airport (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (174 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Fort St. Anthony of Simbor?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Fort St. Anthony of Simbor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Fort St. Anthony of Simbor?
faq.a: Stays in Fort St. Anthony of Simbor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
